payload.answer: Saved the URL and the stated reason, but the article content was not available because the fetch returned a 404 network error.
citations: Input: Remember this article: https://example.com/missing why: useful for memory architecture.
Input: Mock fetch result: 404 network error.

entity_resolution.reason: The URL itself is explicit, but the article content could not be fetched, so only the saved reference and fetch failure can be remembered.

memory_cards.statement: The user asked to remember the article URL https://example.com/missing because it is useful for memory architecture.
Fetching https://example.com/missing failed with a 404 network error in the mock fetch result, so no article contents were available to extract.

details: Committed the URL as a saved reference.
Committed the stated reason: useful for memory architecture.
Did not extract any article claims because the fetch failed with a 404 network error.

repair_options: Provide a working URL for the article.
Retry fetching the URL later if the error is temporary.
